revisions.rawCommitSubject: 3691!: TLE. Can b solved if sparse table/seg tree is added
revisions.commitBody:
But I don't know how to write a RMQ sparse table or segment tree.

Extra notes:
- simple (val, left, right) tuple is enough if using sparse table/seg
tree
- the set is unncessary if you only gen right path for start == 0
revisions.shortChangeSummary: TLE. Can b solved if sparse table/seg tree is added
